title: 15-Min Chicken Bowl
summary: High-protein bowl with veggies and a quick sauce.
steps: Warm chicken and veggies in a skillet.
Mix yogurt + hot sauce + salt to make sauce.
Assemble bowls over rice and drizzle sauce.
content: Swap rice for cauliflower rice or add extra veggies.
Store sauce separately so it stays fresh.

title: Overnight Oats (Berry)
summary: Fast breakfast that tastes like dessert but fuels your day.
steps: Mix oats, milk, yogurt, and chia in a jar.
Eat cold or warm it up.
content: Try peanut butter + banana, or cocoa + strawberries.
